title: Mob Hilt Swords
description: Unique swords based on natural wielders!
body:
Changes the designs of stone, iron, and gold swords to be based on the wither skeleton, vex, and piglin respectively when those mobs wield their swords. This makes the two textures more harmonious and also makes the swords more unique! There's also a version that always gives the swords the special textures, if you play on an older game version.

That's all. Enjoy! =]

_Do not reupload in any capacity. If you want to use assets, ask for permission. ^-^_
